message:
feat(search): add reranker registry for model selection and bake-off

New reranker_registry module (576 lines) providing centralized
management of available reranker models:

Registered models:
- ms-marco-MiniLM-L-6-v2: Baseline cross-encoder for bake-off
- bge-reranker-v2-m3: BGE v2 cross-encoder (eligible)
- jina-reranker-v1-turbo-en: Fast Jina turbo (eligible)
- jina-reranker-v2-base-multilingual: Multilingual (eligible)

Key features:
- list_available(): Enumerate registered rerankers with metadata
- get_info(name): Retrieve specific reranker details
- create_reranker(name, models_dir): Factory for instantiation
- validate_model_files(): Check ONNX dependencies exist
- Bake-off eligibility filtering (2025-11-01 cutoff date)
- Default reranker constant (ms-marco)

This enables CLI model selection (--reranker flag) and automated
bake-off evaluation between eligible cross-encoder models.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
